description: Autoloop hooks wired to repo-vendored guard scripts. Codex exposes no project-dir env var (verified absent in codex 0.144.5 binaries), so the repo root is resolved via git from the hook's cwd; every hook fails LOUD when the vendored script is missing (wrong toplevel from a nested checkout), and the command guard fails CLOSED.

hooks.command: r="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; s="$r/tools/agentic/session-preflight.sh"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then bash "$s"; else echo "autoloop: $s not found — launch Codex from the repo root or re-run autoloop:setup" >&2; fi

r="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; f="$r/docs/agentic/STATE.md"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then printf '
## autoloop — auto-primed STATE (docs/agentic/STATE.md)

'; cat "$f"; else echo "autoloop: $f not found — this repo is not set up (autoloop:setup) or Codex was launched outside the repo root" >&2; fi

s="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tools/agentic/command-guard.mjs"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then node "$s"; else echo "autoloop: command guard $s not found — refusing commands until Codex runs from the repo root" >&2; exit 2; fi
s="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tools/agentic/label-swap-reminder.mjs"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then node "$s"; else echo "autoloop: label-swap reminder $s not found" >&2; fi

s="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tools/agentic/subagent-transcript.mjs"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then node "$s"; else echo "autoloop: transcript capture $s not found — subagent transcript NOT captured this stop" >&2; fi

s="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tools/agentic/writeback-check.mjs"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then node "$s"; else echo "autoloop: writeback check $s not found (nested checkout?) — write-back contract NOT verified this Stop" >&2; fi
